---
title: "Miss Redgrave"
---

## Miss Redgrave

### Description

writing for <i>MP</i> in 1862

### Biography

CMY\'s correspondent may possibly be the Elizabeth Redgrave whose <i>The Word and the Work, or, The Harmony of Scripture with Geological Discoveries</i> (London: Mozley 1860) was praised in <i>MP</i> (January 1860), 111.  It was described as \'a series of conversations between a clergyman and a mechanic, intended to popularize Hugh Miller\'s views of the Periods of Creation, and to show how they may be reconciled with the Scriptural narrative.\'

### Letters

- Letter from Nov 3d 1862
- Letter from Novr/ 4 [1860s?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
